knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Suwe Ora Jamu when an Indonesian SMB says HR software sounds expensive; affordable HR workflow can replace manual HRD work without enterprise complexity.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Manual HRD work was harder for an Indonesian SMB/startup F&B business.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny made HR work easier and was positioned as useful, affordable HR support for startups and UMKM.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: ID SMB/startup F&B, beverage, cafe, or UMKM operators with manual HR admin and budget sensitivity.
